todos.title: Initialize TanStack Start project with Bun
todos.description: Set up the base TanStack Start project using Bun as the package manager and runtime

todos.title: Configure Shadcn UI with Base UI
todos.description: Install and configure Shadcn UI using Base UI (MUI) primitives with maia style

todos.title: Create sidebar navigation
todos.description: Implement sidebar component with Home and Students navigation items

todos.title: Create empty state components
todos.description: Create reusable empty state component for pages without content

todos.title: Configure root layout with sidebar
todos.description: Update root layout to include SidebarProvider and sidebar components

todos.title: Create Home and Students pages
todos.description: Create route pages for Home and Students with empty states

todos.title: Verify application build and dev server
todos.description: Run build and dev server to verify all components work correctly

todos.title: Implement student list functionality
todos.description: Add ability to display and manage a list of students on the Students page

todos.title: Implement dashboard widgets for Home page
todos.description: Add summary widgets and statistics to the Home page

todos.title: Fix useMemo dependency in announcements route
todos.description: Fix empty dependency array in useMemo at src/routes/announcements.index.tsx:15-18. Add [mockAnnouncements] as dependency or remove useMemo if data is static.

todos.title: Replace useMemo with useEffect for pagination reset
todos.description: Convert useMemo to useEffect at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:60-64. useMemo is being used for side effects (resetting pagination) which is an anti-pattern.

todos.title: Remove deprecated type aliases
todos.description: Delete unused deprecated type aliases (SortField, SortOperator, SortCriterion) from src/types/student.ts:94-99. These have no usage in the codebase.

todos.title: Clean up package.json dependencies
todos.description: Remove react-grab (only loaded via CDN), move shadcn to devDependencies, remove tw-animate-css (no imports found).

todos.title: Extract reusable SidebarMenuItems component
todos.description: Create <SidebarMenuItems items={...} isCollapsed={...} /> component to eliminate duplicate menu item rendering at src/components/app-sidebar.tsx:67-88 and 96-112.

todos.title: Extract color threshold utility function
todos.description: Create getStatusColor(value, thresholds) utility in src/lib/utils.ts to replace repeated color logic at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:314-420 (used 6 times).

todos.title: Add aria-labels to class selector buttons
todos.description: Add descriptive aria-label attributes to level/class buttons at src/components/students/class-selector.tsx:104-131 for accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-label to notification button
todos.description: Add aria-label="Notifications" to bell icon button at src/components/app-header.tsx:80 for screen reader accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-label to search input
todos.description: Add aria-label="Search students" to search input at src/components/students/student-filters.tsx:41-47 for accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-labels to filter popover
todos.description: Add aria-label="Filter students" and aria-expanded state to filter popover button at src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx:530-542.

todos.title: Add aria-labels to pagination
todos.description: Add aria-current="page" to active page button and aria-label="Page N" to all page buttons at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:515-530.

todos.title: Memoize activeFields in multi-filter-popover
todos.description: Wrap activeFields Set computation in useMemo at src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx:395-398 to prevent unnecessary recalculations.

todos.title: Memoize getPageNumbers in student-table
todos.description: Use useMemo or useCallback for pagination calculation at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:79-112 to prevent recalculation on every render.

todos.title: Extract filter field options to config file
todos.description: Move filterFieldOptions from src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx to src/data/filter-config.ts for better organization.

todos.title: Create usePagination custom hook
todos.description: Extract pagination logic from src/components/students/student-table.tsx to a new src/hooks/use-pagination.ts custom hook.

todos.title: Add error boundary to root layout
todos.description: Wrap app in ErrorBoundary component with fallback UI at src/routes/__root.tsx for better error handling.

todos.title: Implement loading skeletons for student table
todos.description: Add loading state with skeleton placeholders to src/routes/students.tsx using the existing src/components/ui/skeleton.tsx component.

todos.title: Improve responsive design for filter toolbar
todos.description: Add flex-col md:flex-row for mobile stacking at src/components/students/student-filters.tsx:37 to prevent overflow on smaller screens.
